oracle._comment: Gates src/triggers/oracle_alerts.py -- the CryptoScope Oracle quant signal (src/sources/cryptoscope_oracle.py), recomputed fresh every run from Kraken klines for every coin in watchlist.crypto. Only alerts on a Strongly Bullish/Bearish verdict with real signal agreement (min_confidence), and only once per coin per min_hours_between_alerts UNLESS the verdict label itself has changed since the last alert. Deliberately NOT gated by ai_manager's day/night posting cap -- min_minutes_between_any_alert is its own flat, independent throttle (across every coin combined) instead.

filler._comment: Lowest priority of all -- only posts if nothing else fired this run. max_per_day bounds worst-case cost; with hourly checks, 24 would mean 'every empty hour' literally. Lower this (e.g. to 4-6) if filler ends up eating too much of the monthly budget -- see README cost math.

content_drafts._comment: Telegram-only draft ideas (never posted to X automatically) -- see src/triggers/content_drafts.py. Lower pct_change_trigger than price_alerts' since these are free (no X spend), just Telegram noise to weigh.
